rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Curtiss-Wright Corporation'S Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, Requests For Production Of Documents, And Form Interrogatories, And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 18, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. PLAINTIFFS MARGARET GAUGER, GAUGER CHRISTOPHER, AND CHARLES GAUGER'S Motion To Compel Defendant Curtiss-Wright Corporation'S Further Responses To Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, Requests For Production Of Documents, And Form Interrogatories, And For Sanctions. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Curtiss-Wright Corp.¿s further discovery responses and for sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT LAWRENCE LEVENE VS. BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion Of Defendant Mccord Corporation To Compel Further Responses To Its Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions And Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS DISCOVERY CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 18, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 2. DEFENDANT MCCORD CORPORATION MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Its Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions And Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Defendant McCord Corp.¿s motion to compel further discovery responses and request for sanctions. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, no later than 4:30pm today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating either: 1) without argument, what issues remain and then appear at the hearing tomorrow at 9am or 2) they agree that need further time to meet and confer and the date they wish to have the motion heard in the event any issues remain. = (220/HEK)
